source_pr.title: dumpling: support sql retry mechanism for meta conn
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/29542

Problem Summary: Dumpling disconnected during the chunk division/meta dumping stage without retrying, causing the backup to fail. 

### What is changed and how it works?
Add Baseconn struct to support automatically retry for most sql errors.
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
support sql retry mechanism for meta conn
```

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: files: dumpling/export/conn.go, dumpling/export/dump.go, dumpling/export/dump_test.go, dumpling/export/retry.go, dumpling/export/sql.go, dumpling/export/sql_test.go, dumpling/export/writer.go, dumpling/export/writer_util.go, dumpling/tests/chaos/run.sh
